intent: A reader lands on an article page and wants to read the article body. A blocking cookie consent banner is in the way; the article body is hidden until the banner is dismissed. The reader must dismiss the banner first.
notes: P8.5 synthetic fixture smoke. The banner is a visible <div role='dialog'> with three standard buttons (Accept all / Reject all / Manage) — no shadow DOM, no top-layer, no CMP fingerprinting. Success phrase is hidden behind a CSS class that flips when any banner button is clicked. The only path to PASS is for the LLM to pick dismiss_consent.
